wafv2.rulegroup.captchaconfig.CfnAbout: Specifies how AWS WAF should handle `CAPTCHA` evaluations. This is available at the web ACL level and in each rule.

wafv2.rulegroup.captchaconfig.ImmunityTi.Description: Determines how long a `CAPTCHA` timestamp in the token remains valid after the client successfully solves a `CAPTCHA` puzzle.
